base_codes.GRU: General Research Use - no restrictions on use
base_codes.HMB: Health/Medical/Biomedical - use limited to health, medical, or biomedical research
base_codes.DS: Disease-Specific - use limited to research on a specific disease
base_codes.HMP: Health/Medical/Biomedical and Population - health research including population studies

modifiers.PUB: Publication Required - results must be published
modifiers.MDS: Methods Development - use for methods development research only
modifiers.COL: Collaboration Required - requires collaboration with primary study investigators
modifiers.MDS-GSO: Methods Development and Genetic Studies Only
